gate_requirements.GROUP_CAPABILITY_0_FIXED_APPLICATION_CON: fixed R1000 current-surface application receipt must pass
gate_requirements.GROUP_CAPABILITY_10_NO_VALUE_OR_TAXONOMY: no value invention or taxonomy action
gate_requirements.GROUP_CAPABILITY_11_NO_SOURCE_OR_RECEIPT: no source row or existing receipt mutation
gate_requirements.GROUP_CAPABILITY_1_SELECTED_GROUP_CONFIR: selected group must match AUTHORITY_BOUNDARY / healthy_boundary_stop / STOP_AUTHORITY_BOUNDARY
gate_requirements.GROUP_CAPABILITY_5_SELECTED_GROUP_PROFIL: selected group profile must be emitted
gate_requirements.GROUP_CAPABILITY_6_DECISION_TABLE_EMITTE: selected group inspection decision table must be emitted
gate_requirements.GROUP_CAPABILITY_7_SCOPE_SELECTED_GROUP_: contract must not generalize to all groups
gate_requirements.GROUP_CAPABILITY_8_NO_INSPECTION_EXECUTE: this unit must authorize capability only, not inspect
gate_requirements.GROUP_CAPABILITY_9_NO_R1000_RUN_OR_REPAI: no new R1000 run or repair execution
